summary: Pin plugin metadata docs to deterministic package versions and register opencode-multi-auth-codex plugin metadata.
root_cause: Plugin docs and catalog metadata mixed latest aliases and legacy package names, creating parity drift and unclear provenance.
fix_approach: Normalized metadata to pinned versions that match runtime plugin specs and added the missing multi-auth metadata entry.

validation.notes: Parity script reports manifest/config set alignment and pinned package specs.
